reviews.comment:
No hay un buen trato en la oficina . Es perder el tiempo  tardan en atender y si entras y están atendiendo dos empleados con un socio ni buenas tardes te dicen y menso aguarde ya lo atiendo. Una falta de criterio tremendo. Cómo.que te hacen un favor.. todo lo contrario con ACA de  Av. Colón. En un segundo te atienden

(Translated by Google)
The service at the office is terrible. It's a waste of time; they take forever to serve you, and if you go in and two employees are already working with a partner, they don't even say good afternoon, much less just "wait, I'll be with you." It's incredibly rude. They act like they're doing you a favor... completely unlike the ACA branch on Av. Colón. They serve you in a flash.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2511053987051317301/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCclpQRUxREAE

reviews.comment:
Bueno promos en combi con tarjetas nación
Y si haces la Vtv en el.aca y te rebotan por una lucecita tienen un lindo market en el.shop y te tomas un cafesote para bajar el.enoio!!

(Translated by Google)
Great deals on combo meals with Nación cards!
And if you get your vehicle inspection done at the ACA and they fail you for a minor issue, they have a nice market in the shop where you can grab a big coffee to calm your nerves!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2511053987051317301/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tkS1RuaFFhVFpxUWpGQ1ExaGpNMnA1WDAxbFVuYxAB

reviews.comment:
Las chicas que atienden son muy amables. Los baños de adentro están muy bien. Los de afuera, no tanto

(Translated by Google)
The staff are very friendly. The indoor restrooms are great. The outdoor ones, not so much.

reviews.comment:
Las cinco estrellas son para Roberto, buena voluntad y predisposición para ayudarnos en boxes.. nadie en todo mar del plata nos quiso ayudar y el en 5 minutos nos soluciono!!! Grande Roberto

(Translated by Google)
Five stars for Roberto! His kindness and willingness to help us in the pits... nobody in all of Mar del Plata wanted to help us, and he solved our problem in 5 minutes! Great job, Roberto!
